description: Phase 2 report series detection improvements - EIR, NAS-NS, Natural Language Summaries, FFR chapters

eir-series.pattern: Eidg. Institut für Reaktorforschung, EIR-Bericht, EIR-XXX
eir-series.notes: Conservative pattern to avoid false positives from German words; EIR-215 remains undetected due to OCR 'Eldg.' vs 'Eidg.' variation

nas-ns-series.pattern: NAS-NS-XXXX, National Academy of Sciences, Nuclear Science

ornl-review-series.pattern: ORNL Vol. X, No. Y format

false_positive_management.anl-7958_excluded: ANL report correctly excluded from EIR detection
false_positive_management.kontrolblatt_excluded: Library control sheet excluded from EIR detection

remaining_improvements.eir-215_detection: Would require OCR variation handling (Eldg. vs Eidg.)
remaining_improvements.ffr-chapter_detection: Already covered at 38 docs; book chapter detection complete
remaining_improvements.nat-series_expansion: Additional patterns could be added for document title patterns
